quote: Peace at home, peace in the world.
author: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk

quote: Victory is for those who can say 'Victory is mine'. Success is for those who can begin saying 'I will succeed' and say 'I have succeeded' in the end.
author: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk

quote: There are no hopeless situations, there are only hopeless people. I have never lost my hope.
author: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk

quote: A nation's real wealth is the intelligence of its youth.
author: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk

quote: It is better to be on hand with ten men than absent with ten thousand.
author: Timur (Tamerlane)

quote: I am not a man of blood; and God is my witness that in all my wars I have never been the aggressor, and that my enemies have always been the authors of their own calamity.
author: Timur (Tamerlane)

quote: For a warrior, death on the battlefield is the highest honor. To die of illness or old age is a shame.
author: Metehan (Modu Chanyu)

quote: Land is the foundation of the state, it cannot be given away.
author: Metehan (Modu Chanyu)

quote: There, where I have passed, the grass will never grow again.
author: Attila the Hun

quote: It takes less courage to criticize the decisions of others than to stand by your own.
author: Attila the Hun

quote: There is nothing impossible to him who will try.
author: Alexander the Great

quote: I am not afraid of an army of lions led by a sheep; I am afraid of an army of sheep led by a lion.
author: Alexander the Great

quote: A tomb now suffices him for whom the whole world was not sufficient.
author: Alexander the Great
